settings.title: An Evolutionary Leap
settings.description: The remarkable CONSPIT CPP series hydraulic pedals have long set the standard, and the new CPP EVO takes this legacy a step further, evolving the design and performance to new heights.

settings.title: The 2nd Gen. CONSPIT Hydraulic System
settings.description: With years of expertise in hydraulic brake systems, CONSPIT’s CPP EVO now features the new Gen 2.0 system. It introduces a dual-stage cylinder for enhanced braking realism, upgrades to the hydraulic structure and seals, and a 20MPa hydraulic sensor, pushing performance to new levels.

settings.title: Dual-stage Cylinders
settings.description: The CPP EVO features dual-stage hydraulic cylinders, each with independently adjustable preload forces, allowing drivers to fine-tune both stages for a personalized braking experience. The design offers a soft initial pedal feel, transitioning to a firmer response as braking pressure increases, providing superior control and feedback.

settings.title: 20Mpa High-precision Hydraulic Sensor
settings.description: The CONSPIT 2nd Gen. hydraulic system features a 20MPa high-precision sensor that detects even the smallest changes in brake pressure, enabling fine-tuned braking performance. Its wide range allows professional sim racers to fully harness realistic racing dynamics.

settings.title: Enhanced Durability and Performance
settings.description: With a completely reworked internal layout, improved sealing, and high-quality materials, the system offers superior high-pressure endurance, ensuring stable performance in even the most demanding racing conditions.

settings.title: Exceptional Adjustability
settings.description: Designed from the perspective of professional drivers, the CPP EVO further expands the boundaries of adjustability in the sim racing experience.

settings.title: Ergonomic Adjustment
settings.description: The pedal spacing, surface angle, panel height, and footrest position are all adjustable, ensuring exceptional comfort whether you're applying heavy braking or making precise maneuvers.

settings.title: Pedal Feel Adjustment
settings.description:
Throttle:
Four levels of quick, step-wise adjustment for pedal force, with decoupled control for pedal travel and spring preload.

Brake:
Four levels of quick, step-wise adjustment for pedal force, with independent preload adjustment for the front and rear stages.

Clutch:
Adjustable spring preload with four levels of bite point feel adjustment.

settings.title: Race-grade Full CNC Aluminum Alloy
settings.description: CNC-machined from 6061-T6 aluminum alloy, with a fine sandblasted and anodized finish that provides a durable and robust coating.

settings.title: M-DVF Vibration Module
settings.description:
Equipped with the M-DVF vibration feedback module as standard, addressing crucial information often missing in sim racing.

CONSPIT continues to work closely with SimHub on product development, CPP EVO rumble module supports SimHub Shakelt Motors, offering comprehensive customization options for various conditions within SimHub.

settings.title: CONSPIT Aesthetic Style
settings.description: Exemplifying precision and modernity, the design philosophy of CONSPIT relentlessly pursues the seamless integration of modern technology with racing industry aesthetics, and the CPP EVO is no exception.
